[[File:Forgetting Inceldom.svg|thumb]]Participatory love is loving in the [[being mode]] rather than the [[having mode]]<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bPHqY4WiwwU</ref> it is a participatory experience of transcendence. It is not [[Romance]] but it is [[Eros]].

It is a type of [[Xenia]].

== See Also ==

* [[Eusexuality]]
* [[Xenia]]

==References==

[[Category:Sexuality]]
[[sn:Participatory love]][[Category:Love]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Participatory love]][[Category:Xenia]]
[[sn:Participatory love]][[sn:Participatory love]][[Category:Forgetting]]
[[Category:Pages]]
